core_payload.content:
# Workspace Project

## 1. Role
Workspace Project will become a truly seamless second-brain habitat: one place to ask, think, plan, upload, review, and delegate without context leaking into disconnected tools.

## 2. Future Habitat Contract
The project will deliver a unified multimodal composer for text, voice, files, and capsule-aware commands; visible day, week, roadmap, and branch context in one calm operating surface; native-feeling assistant and swarm visibility; and stronger human override and approval patterns around mutation and delegation.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Workspace will stop feeling like a productivity shell wrapped around deeper systems. It will feel like the place where a human genuinely lives with the second brain and where graph truth, agent help, and daily rhythm become one coherent instrument.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Workspace Project supports To Dig Deep by making second-brain life calm, legible, habitual, and graph-native every day.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Workspace Project defines the future seamless habitat of N1Hub: a unified multimodal composer, calmer day/week/roadmap context, native assistant and swarm visibility, stronger approval patterns, and a more coherent place to live with the second brain instead of merely using adjacent tools.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
